tool_args.label: Central Business District Tolling Program
tool_args.raw_text: On January 5, 2025, MTA Bridges and Tunnels launched the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP) - commonly referred to as congestion pricing. This program tolls vehicles that enter the Congestion Relief Zone (CRZ) in Manhattan.

payload.description: Congestion pricing program tolls vehicles entering the Congestion Relief Zone in Manhattan, launched by MTA Bridges and Tunnels.

tool_args.label: Henry Hudson Bridge Revenue Collection Rate January 2025
Ghost Plate Task Force Results - 10 Months

payload.claim_text: In ten months, this task force held over 60 operations, focusing on drivers who cover, obstruct and alter their license plates or use counterfeit plates. These operations produced amazing results, with over 34,000 summonses issued, over 3,400 vehicles towed, and 740 arrests made.
payload.description: Ghost plate task force results announced by Governor Hochul and Mayor Adams in March, in ten months: over 34,000 summonses, over 3,400 vehicles towed, 740 arrests
payload.subject: Inter-agency ghost plate task force

payload.claim_text: In less than a year after they were removed in 2017, TBTA experienced reductions in peak travel times by up to 32%, with customers saving 3.4 million hours of travel time. There was a reduction of carbon emissions of more than 15,000 tons, with fuel consumption reductions of 1.6 billion gallons. Since 2016, collisions at TBTA facilities have decreased by 62% because traffic is free flowing and not stopping at toll booths.
payload.subject: Open Road Tolling at TBTA facilities
payload.description: After toll booth removal in 2017, TBTA experienced reductions in peak travel times up to 32%, 3.4 million hours travel time savings, carbon emission reduction of 15,000 tons, fuel reduction of 1.6 billion gallons, and collision reduction of 62% since 2016.

payload.raw_value_text: recovered more than $44 million dollars through TBTA's participation in New York State DMV's registration suspension program, marking a 25% increase over the amount recovered in 2023

tool_args.label: Queens Midtown Tunnel Revenue Collection Rate Jan 2025
Hugh L. Carey Tunnel Revenue Collection Rate Jan 2025

payload.claim_text: TBTA collects the equivalent of 96% of the tolls it is owed through a variety of methods including collection agency placements, New York State DMV suspensions, out-of-state suspensions and plate clearances, judgments, roadside interdictions and vehicles towed, payment plans, and commercial account assistance.
payload.subject: TBTA toll collection

payload.claim_text: In 2024: customer collisions on TBTA crossings decreased by 16%; TBTA initiated a judgment program addressing Persistent Toll Violators and recovered more than $4.6 million; TBTA initiated a complete restructuring of the agency to align with its current mission; TBTA's Security & Operations Department launched a drone program licensing ten drone pilots.
payload.subject: TBTA
payload.description: Summary of key TBTA accomplishments in 2024

payload.raw_value_text: customer collisions on TBTA crossings decreased by 16%

tool_args.label: Joe Keane Retirement - 37 Years of Service

payload.description: Joe Keane, C&D Senior Vice President and TBTA Chief Engineer, retiring after 37 years of service; longest serving Chief Engineer in TBTA history; instrumental in Sandy recovery projects, Open Road Tolling and Congestion Relief Zone.

tool_args.label: Projects Awarded Under Joe Keane's Leadership

payload.raw_value_text: TBTA awarded nearly $6.5 billion dollars in projects
payload.scope: TBTA projects under Joe Keane's leadership

tool_args.label: Projects Under Budget Under Joe Keane

payload.raw_value_text: bringing projects to completion more than $400 million dollars under budget

payload.description: 60th anniversary of the opening of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge; President Sheridan joined TBTA's on-site facility team in recognition of their daily round-the-clock efforts.

payload.scope: MTA Bridges and Tunnels all facilities

payload.claim_text: The first month of 2025 came in strong, with a prolonged period of frigid temperatures, high winds and some snow touching down on TBTA facilities.
payload.subject: Weather conditions
payload.description: January 2025 experienced prolonged frigid temperatures, high winds and snow at TBTA facilities

payload.claim_text: One procurement action sought for Board approval to award an amendment to a Personal Service contract with Gannett Fleming Engineering and Architecture P.C. to provide Project Management Office Consultant Services in a not-to-exceed amount of $2.1 million. TBTA, the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey, and the New York State Thruway Authority will equally share the costs.
payload.subject: TBTA procurement

payload.claim_text: TBTA's Security & Operations Department launched a robust and industry-leading drone program to include the licensing of ten drone pilots. Their focus on new technologies to enhance infrastructure security resulted in a reduction of unauthorized intrusions.
payload.subject: TBTA Security & Operations Department
payload.description: TBTA launched a drone program with ten licensed drone pilots
